calendar.matters:
Notice And Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-20-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Seymour Seidscher, Atty. for Defendant and opposing party: Leland Ackland
No appearances made by Plantiff.

RULING: TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Award Of Attorney'S Fees Pursuant To Ccp 1717, Ccp 1032, 1033.5 And Ccp 685.040
Off Calendar Apr-24-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INCORPORATED DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU'S Motion For Award Of Attorney'S Fees Pursuant To CCP 1717, CCP 1032, 1033.5 And CCP 685.040 IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-06-2009 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Feb-06-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- LELAND ACKLAND, TEL. NO. 864-2232, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN COURT.
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - NOTICE WAS NOT GIVEN TO THE OTHER PARTY AFTER THE TENTATIVE RULING CAME OUT. DEFENDANT IS REQUESTING A CONTINUANCE ON THE MATTER ON BEHALF OF HIS COUNSEL. THE COURT DENIED HIS REQUEST BECAUSE THERE WAS NO TIMELY OPPOSITION FILED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INCORPORATED'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR# 8189 =301/PJB

Off Calendar Nov-17-2008 Set For Trial On Mar-09-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
